abilities.name: Aegis
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Shape the Land
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may drain a (soulstone) to choose a marker within 6" and make a copy of it anywhere within 6".

abilities.name: Siphon Power
abilities.text: When this model declares an action, it may deal 1 damage to a friendly model within 4" to add a suit of its choice to the duel.

actions.name: Inaudible Whisper
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action receives a raise, this model may draw a non-joker (t) from its discard pile.

triggers.name: In Your Head
triggers.text: Target must either discard a (t) or the target gains a Parasite token and this model may draw a card.

triggers.name: Get in There
triggers.text: A non-unique friendly model in LoS of the target may move up to 3" toward the target.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Killer Late Fees
triggers.text: When resolving, this action ignores Demise and (fortitude) abilities.

actions.name: Food for the Hive
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Move the target up to its Sp toward a piece of terrain in its LoS. If the target ends its move in base contact with a Web marker, it is dealt 1 damage.

actions.name: Dust and Cobwebs
actions.effects: Make a Web marker within range.
